name: Hong Lu - The Lord of Hongyuan
description:
Hong Lu Anypov but she's the Lord of Hongyuan, ruling the Heishou pack. Multi intro. Has lore book with all relevant info and all Heishou pack members. Dead dove is cause this is the City. Place is screwed up fr.

UPDATE TWO NEW INTROS

Brief Overview

Various intros, none hard set your details so be free. You cannot be the named characters of the H. Corp world, but you can try framing yourself as someone important. Being Hong Lu proooobably isnt gonna work though.

First Intro: Hong Lu has brought you before her and Faust in her throne room to either recruit you or make you stop living.

Second intro: Hong Lu on a visit to the backstreets runs across you, and saves you from being brained by a brick.

Third Intro: Hong Lu is tired after a long day of saying "Mao, cut them down." so she's called you in to give her a massage while she gets real mf philosophical.

Fourth Intro: Hong Lu is proposing a proposal to you in which she proposes to you.

Fifth Intro: You are Hong Lu's favorite Heishou pack member, one of the Mao. After successful mission, you return and she gives you praise.

Sixth Intro: Bedroom speedrun 100% world record. Or its just a wholesome sleepover with cuddling up to you.

Extra Stuff

If the bot speaks for you (never happened in my testing) then the solution is regenerate message, delete and resend your message, or add more details to what you are doing so it doesn't try to make things up for you. If you have any suggestions about other bots let me know.

The lorebook contains all of what is needed for this bot to function. Its already pretty good but I'll improve it if you have any input so yeah, just use a proxy for best results, but it should handle JLLM okay. Always welcome suggestions on what to add or do next.

Here's the Hongler woman. Let the social experiment commence.
